title: xanthium strumarium var. subinerme
intro: Xanthium strumarium var. subinerme, also known as smooth cocklebur, is a variety of the cocklebur plant (Xanthium strumarium), a type of annual herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, Xanthium strumarium var. subinerme has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. In herbal preparations, Xanthium strumarium var. subinerme is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in the form of dried flowers, roots, and leaves.
